name: Penne Heaven
recipeIngredient: Herbs: Basil, Fines Herbs or Italian Seasoning
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pasta according to directions on the package; drain.
2. While the pasta is cooking, heat some cooking liquid over medium-high heat in a 3-quart saucepan.
3. Add the onion and garlic. I also sauté shoestring carrot strips (about 1 cup) for sweetness. Cook, stirring until softened.
4. Add the tomatoes, water, salt, and sugar. Cook, stirring often, for 10 minutes.
5. Add the broccoli, zucchini, sugar snaps, carrots, and parsley. Stir in the Parmesan.
6. Serve over the pasta. Substitute soy parmesan if you are dairy-free but don't leave the Parmesan out!
